name: augustus
description: Persistent AI identity research platform. Observe agent sessions, manage attractor basins, review tier proposals and evaluator flags, search semantic memory, and annotate agent behavior.
long_description: Augustus is a research platform for studying persistent AI identity through attractor basin dynamics. This extension exposes the full Augustus observation and management toolkit to Claude Desktop, enabling you to query session transcripts, track basin trajectories, review tier modification proposals, resolve evaluator flags, manage annotations, and perform semantic search across agent data — all without leaving the conversation.

data_dir.title: Augustus Data Directory
data_dir.description: Directory containing your Augustus databases (augustus.db and chromadb/). This is the same data directory used by the Augustus desktop app.

tools.name: get_session_summary
tools.description: Get a structured summary of a specific session.

tools.name: get_session_transcript
tools.description: Retrieve the complete transcript for a session.

tools.name: get_close_report
tools.description: Retrieve the close report for a session.

tools.name: get_basin_trajectory
tools.description: Get alpha trajectory for a specific basin over recent sessions.

tools.name: get_all_trajectories
tools.description: Get all basin trajectories for an agent.

tools.name: search_sessions
tools.description: Semantic search across session content for an agent.

tools.name: get_evaluator_flags
tools.description: Get flagged sessions for an agent.

tools.name: get_tier_proposals
tools.description: Get tier modification proposals for an agent.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List all registered agents with summary statistics.

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description: List recent sessions for an agent with pending review counts.

tools.name: search_all
tools.description: Cross-agent semantic search.

tools.name: add_observation
tools.description: Add a human evaluation note or observation.

tools.name: search_observations
tools.description: Search observations and annotations for an agent.

tools.name: get_agent_annotations
tools.description: Get annotations for an agent, optionally filtered to a specific session.

tools.name: delete_annotation
tools.description: Delete a specific annotation by its ID.

tools.name: approve_tier_proposal
tools.description: Approve a pending tier modification proposal.

tools.name: flag_session
tools.description: Flag a session for attention.

tools.name: reject_tier_proposal
tools.description: Reject a pending tier proposal with rationale.

tools.name: modify_tier_proposal
tools.description: Approve a proposal with modified parameters.

tools.name: get_pending_review_items
tools.description: Get all items awaiting brain review for an agent.

tools.name: resolve_flag
tools.description: Resolve an evaluator flag.

tools.name: create_basin
tools.description: Brain-initiated basin creation (bypasses proposal flow).

tools.name: modify_basin
tools.description: Direct basin parameter adjustment (bypasses proposal flow).

tools.name: deprecate_basin
tools.description: Soft-deprecate a basin.

tools.name: undeprecate_basin
tools.description: Restore a deprecated basin to active tracking.

tools.name: lock_basin
tools.description: Lock a basin so body cannot modify it.

tools.name: unlock_basin
tools.description: Remove brain lock from a basin.

tools.name: set_basin_bounds
tools.description: Set alpha bounds that body must respect.

tools.name: get_basin_history
tools.description: Get recent modifications for a specific basin (audit trail).

tools.name: create_proposal
tools.description: Create a proposal that sits in the pending queue for later review.
